solution_criteria: Meal plan includes 4-5 meals distributed throughout the day
Total daily calories support a caloric surplus appropriate for a 95kg athlete
All meals comply with vegan dietary restrictions
Protein sources provide adequate intake for muscle growth (minimum 1.6g per kg body weight)
Meals are practical and compact for a single day format
Meal plan maintains a calorie deficit appropriate for weight loss
All meals are gluten-free or use gluten-free alternatives
Macronutrients are balanced across all meals
Meal plan is compact and covers one full day

prompt_inputs.goal: marathon training with high-carbohydrate nutrition for endurance

solution_criteria: Meal plan includes 4 eating occasions (breakfast, lunch, dinner, snack) with carbohydrate-focused options
Total daily calories and macronutrient distribution support endurance athlete needs
Plan is formatted compactly in 1 day structure with clear meal descriptions
